title: ExposoGraph 3.0 Port Type (Phase 2)
description: Schema for a single port-type record within data/ontology/port_types.json port_types array.

type_id.description: Unique type identifier in the form 'base_kind:semantic_name', e.g. 'score:flux_ratio'.

label.description: Human-readable label for the port type.

base_kind.description: Primitive data kind: number (float/int), category (string enum), boolean, or record (dict/object/list).

unit.description: SI or domain unit, or null for dimensionless/categorical types.

range.description: Valid numeric range in interval notation, or null for non-numeric types.

description.description: Description of what this port type represents and where it is used.
